name: Shahnawaz Mohammed
title: Senior .NET Engineer · Solutions Architect · Azure Specialist
tagline: Senior .NET Engineer and Solutions Architect with fourteen years delivering enterprise-grade ASP.NET Core and Angular platforms across federal, state, healthcare, and financial sectors.
summary: Senior .NET Engineer, Solutions Architect, and Tech Lead with 14+ years of hands-on experience designing, developing, architecting, and supporting enterprise-scale .NET applications and Angular front-ends.

Headline stack — ASP.NET Core 10 / .NET 8 / .NET 6, C# 12, Entity Framework Core, Web API, Worker Services, gRPC, SignalR — paired with Angular 18 (and AngularJS for legacy modernization), TypeScript, and component-driven UI.

Microservices and event-driven architecture practitioner — RabbitMQ, Apache Kafka, Azure Service Bus, AWS SQS, MassTransit — with polyglot persistence across SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Cosmos DB, DynamoDB, and Redis.

Reporting, BI, and analytics depth — SSRS, SSAS, Power BI, Tableau, QlikView, Qlik Sense, SAP Crystal Reports, SAP BusinessObjects, Oracle BI Publisher, Minitab, and ad-hoc reporting frameworks integrated into .NET line-of-business platforms.

ERP and enterprise-systems integration — SAP, Oracle E-Business Suite, Made2Manage, Aptean, SAGE, Salesforce, Marketo, and ServiceNow connected to .NET via WCF, Web API, gRPC, and message-bus adapters. CMS work on Sitecore, SharePoint, Umbraco, and Kentico.

Microsoft-certified Azure Solutions Architect Expert and Azure DevOps Engineer Expert. Deep DevOps practice across Azure Pipelines, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, Docker, Kubernetes (AKS / EKS), Terraform, and ARM/Bicep.
Strong identity, security, and integration background — OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, IdentityServer, JWT/Bearer tokens, Azure AD / Entra ID, role-based authorization, and API gateway patterns.
Test-engineering rigor — NUnit, xUnit, MSTest, Moq, NSubstitute, SpecFlow, Playwright; consistently achieves 80–90 %+ code coverage on production .NET workloads.
Served as Software Engineer, Senior .NET Developer, Tech Lead, Solutions Architect, Release Manager, and Project Manager.

Relational Databases: Stored procedures, views, CTEs, window functions
Reporting & BI: SQL Server Analysis Services (SSAS — tabular & multidimensional)
Power BI (Desktop, Service, Embedded, Report Builder)
Excel — Power Query, Power Pivot, pivot tables, advanced formulas
Ad-hoc reporting frameworks & self-service BI dashboards
ERP & Business Systems: Salesforce (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, REST/Bulk APIs)
ERP-to-.NET WCF / Web API integration patterns
AI-Augmented Development: Prompt engineering for code, tests, and docs

highlights: Leads hands-on development on the Enterprise Privacy Policy Engine (EPPE) — a high-traffic ASP.NET Core 8 portal with an Angular 18 SPA front-end supporting Medicaid privacy operations.
Implemented RBAC workflows, media-dispositioning, custom dashboards, dialog forms, and interactive workflow screens using Angular reactive forms and ASP.NET Core Web API.
Redesigned global features — PDF generation (QuestPDF), advanced search, server-side filtering, and Hangfire-scheduled DUA-policy notifications.
Oversees AWS-based deployments to EKS with Docker containers; GitHub Actions and Jenkins pipelines; tag-based releases with Helm charts.
Coordinates zero-downtime UAT and production deployments; mentors juniors and leads cross-functional teams on ASP.NET Core, Angular, and architectural best practices.

experience.company: State of New York — Department of Corrections (NYDOCCS)
highlights: Directed migration of legacy ASP.NET Web Forms portal components to ASP.NET Core 6 with Angular 16 SPAs.
Instituted unit, integration, and regression testing frameworks (xUnit + Moq + Playwright) for production-ready releases.
Enforced RBAC, OIDC-based authorization workflows, and state/federal compliance.
Owned end-to-end CI/CD on Azure DevOps and Git workflows across DEV, QA, UAT, PROD with Octopus Deploy promotion gates.
Mentored juniors on Clean Architecture, EF Core best practices, multi-environment configuration, and Angular component design.

experience.company: State of California — County of San Bernardino (ITSD)
highlights: Led migration of multiple legacy portals (Register-to-Vote, eDocs, Worker Payroll, Affidavit, User Management, ROV Intranet) from classic ASP / Web Forms on NGINX to ASP.NET Core on IIS.
Reverse-engineered legacy code into .NET Core 6 and upgraded to .NET 8 LTS with minimal downtime.
Modularized monoliths into standalone services and Global API-first microservices using gRPC and REST.
Set up Azure Dev/Test/UAT/Prod environments from scratch with Azure Pipelines and CI/CD automation.
Led full Azure DevOps integration — pipeline creation, build/release config, automated NUnit + Playwright testing, deployment tracking.

experience.company: State of New York — Department of Transportation (NYDOT)
highlights: Led the modernization of the Governor's legacy ASP.NET Web Forms portal (2009 build) to ASP.NET Core 6 with Razor Pages + Angular 12.
Major contributor to the Universal Navigation (UNAV) project — a reusable Angular component library deployed across ~8,000 sub-applications including DOT, DMV, and CSEA.
Implemented multi-language localization with .NET resource files and Angular i18n for accessibility and localization compliance.
Managed DEV → QA → UAT → PROD promotion with Azure Pipelines, rollback planning, and post-deployment validation.
Mentored a team of 12 .NET developers on ASP.NET Core, EF Core, and Angular workflows; ensured WCAG 2.1 compliance.
Architected enterprise ASP.NET Core 5/6 microservices with custom modules, RESTful Web APIs, gRPC services, and third-party integrations.
Containerized .NET Core 5 → 6 services with Docker; orchestrated on AKS; messaging on RabbitMQ + Kafka.
Acted as Release Manager — end-to-end release cycles across DEV, QA, UAT, PROD; CAB approvals, rollback playbooks.
Designed Angular 11 SPAs and Blazor Server dashboards for CFO stakeholders backed by GraphQL and Web API endpoints.
Led performance work that reduced API response time ~25% via SQL partitioning, output caching, and Redis-backed query caching.
Served as Accessibility SME ensuring ADA and WCAG 2.1 compliance across web apps, generated PDFs, and Office documents.

experience.company: CALTRANS (State of California Dept of Transportation)
highlights: Hands-on lead across ASP.NET Core 3.1 / 5 and ASP.NET MVC 5 portals for public-facing and internal government applications.
Owned full SDLC — requirements, architecture, development, testing (NUnit + Selenium), deployment, and production support.
Created AS-IS and TO-BE technical documentation, architecture diagrams, ERDs, business workflows, and gap analyses.
Performed ADA/WCAG 2.0 & 2.1 remediation on Angular 9 + Razor pages; Sev-1 production support for mission-critical government portals.
Built Angular 9 and React UI components integrated with .NET Web API + GraphQL backends.

experience.role: Project Lead .NET Developer / Web Applications Support Engineer
highlights: Supported a portfolio of ASP.NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, and ASP.NET Web Forms portals with decoupled Angular 7–11 front-ends.
Owned P1–P4 incident management and SLA communications; vendor coordination across AWS, Azure, and Aptean ERP.
Delivered ERP integrations (Pointman, Made2Manage, SAP, SAGE) using .NET WCF/Web API services with Crystal Reports, Power BI, and Tableau reporting.
Championed ADA/WCAG compliance; audited and remediated ASP.NET Razor views, PDFs, forms, and multimedia.
Led ASP.NET MVC 4 → 5 → ASP.NET Core upgrades, content migration, library refactoring, and security patching.
Built custom responsive React + AngularJS frontends consumed by a .NET Web API back-end.
Managed a 35-member onsite/offshore cross-functional team including Salesforce, Marketo, .NET, and front-end specialists across China, Japan, and Europe.
Championed ADA/WCAG 2.1; delivered accessibility training to 50+ developers and content editors — 100% compliance for new content.
Mentored, coached, and set direction for .NET developers and project managers/analysts across multiple delivery streams.
Designed UI components for multiple internal and customer-facing apps using AngularJS, jQuery, Razor, and ASP.NET MVC 4 + WCF.
Performance-tuned Kafka and MongoDB workloads — adjusted query patterns and configurations to enhance .NET service throughput.
Played a pivotal role in migrating .NET infrastructure to Microsoft Azure — 20% increase in service scalability and reliability.
Led RESTful Web API development driving seamless third-party integrations and automated data exchange.
Created reusable WCF contracts, used SSIS for ETL, and built dashboards in Crystal Reports and Power BI.
Built RESTful Web API services using ASP.NET Core 3.1 with Swagger documentation.
Created internal application UIs with ASP.NET Core Razor Views, AngularJS, and jQuery on a Blueprint CSS foundation.
Used LINQ and Entity Framework Core (Database-First) to implement N-Tier architecture.
Authored unit tests with NUnit and NSubstitute — 90% code coverage was a per-application requirement and was consistently met without gaps.
Used TFS for version control and Agile delivery — daily standups, story breakdown, sprint planning.
Developed and supported multi-tier ASP.NET and ASP.NET MVC web applications in C#.
Implemented WCF service contracts and security via the System.ServiceModel pipeline.
Designed normalized database schemas with config-driven UI rendering tables.
Used Forms Authentication and role-based authorization for fine-grained access control.
Built RESTful services with Web API, secured endpoints with OAuth bearer tokens (JWT).
Created reusable Angular components with shared HTTP interceptors for token attachment.

education.degree: Doctorate — Business Administration Management and Entrepreneurship
education.notes: Completed four semesters with a GPA of 3.8 before voluntarily discontinuing the program. Completed Doctoral Coursework (27 Credit Hours).

education.degree: Masters — Information System Engineering and Management

education.notes: Graduated with Highest Distinction. Recipient of Merit Medal for Academic Excellence.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert

interests: Volunteer work supporting community initiatives and non-profit organizations
Culinary arts — experimenting with recipes and exploring new cuisines
